name: hmcts-apim-sdlc-orchestrator
description: HMCTS API-Marketplace SDLC orchestrator — a contract-first, dual-path pipeline for OpenAPI-first api-cp-* spec libraries and service-cp-* Spring Boot services. Bundles the apim-architect and contract-test-engineer agents, the openapi-spec-reviewer skill (4 policy lenses), APIM context docs (api-spec / service / code standards), and guard hooks (PII, secrets, bash, paths). Reuses the generic hmcts-sdlc-orchestrator agents by reference rather than duplicating them.
